entity_types.name: Account
entity_types.description: A customer or prospect company in the CRM.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Stable account identifier used for exact matching.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Human-readable company name.

properties.name: industry
properties.description: Industry the account operates in, such as logistics or retail.

properties.name: region
properties.description: Commercial region or market bucket such as CIS or EMEA.

properties.name: segment
properties.description: Sales segmentation bucket such as Enterprise or Mid-market.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Lifecycle status of the account, such as Active or Prospect.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Free-form summary of the account context and needs.

entity_types.name: Contact
entity_types.description: A person associated with a customer account.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Stable contact identifier used for exact matching.

properties.name: full_name
properties.description: Full person name used in CRM communication.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Job title or responsibility of the contact.

properties.name: email
properties.description: Primary email address.

properties.name: phone
properties.description: Primary phone number.

entity_types.name: Deal
entity_types.description: A sales opportunity tied to an account.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Stable deal identifier used for exact matching.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Deal title used by sales teams for exact lookup and display. This field accepts the exact title only.

properties.name: stage
properties.description: Sales pipeline stage.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Deal status such as Open or Closed.

properties.name: amount
properties.description: Expected deal amount.

properties.name: probability
properties.description: Probability of closing from 0 to 1.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Free-form summary of the opportunity. Prefer this field for semantic search when the question describes the deal by purpose or context instead of its exact title.

entity_types.name: Ticket
entity_types.description: A customer support case or service request.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Stable ticket identifier used for exact matching.

properties.name: subject
properties.description: Ticket subject or issue summary.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Support ticket status.

properties.name: priority
properties.description: Support priority level.

properties.name: source
properties.description: Inbound channel that created the ticket.

properties.name: category
properties.description: Issue category or support area.

entity_types.name: User
entity_types.description: An internal CRM user such as a sales rep or support lead.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Stable internal user identifier used for exact matching.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Display name of the user.

properties.name: role
properties.description: Role or job function of the user.

properties.name: team
properties.description: Team or group the user belongs to.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: A product or service sold through the CRM.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Stable product identifier used for exact matching.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Product or service name.

properties.name: category
properties.description: Product family or category.

entity_types.name: Activity
entity_types.description: A task, call, workshop, or meeting tracked against a deal.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Stable activity identifier used for exact matching.

properties.name: subject
properties.description: Short description of the activity.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Activity type such as call, meeting, or workshop.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Activity status such as scheduled or completed.

properties.name: due_date
properties.description: Planned due date in ISO format.

relation_types.name: ACCOUNT_OWNER
relation_types.description: Connects an Account to the User who owns it.

relation_types.name: CONTACT_ACCOUNT
relation_types.description: Connects a Contact to the Account they belong to.

relation_types.name: PRIMARY_CONTACT
relation_types.description: Connects an Account to its primary Contact.

relation_types.name: ACCOUNT_DEAL
relation_types.description: Connects an Account to a Deal registered under it.

relation_types.name: DEAL_OWNER
relation_types.description: Connects a Deal to the User responsible for it.

relation_types.name: DEAL_PRODUCT
relation_types.description: Connects a Deal to the Product being sold or renewed.

relation_types.name: TICKET_ACCOUNT
relation_types.description: Connects a Ticket to the Account it belongs to.

relation_types.name: TICKET_OWNER
relation_types.description: Connects a Ticket to the User assigned to resolve it.

relation_types.name: NEXT_ACTIVITY
relation_types.description: Connects a Deal to its next Activity.
